/home/runner/work/order-book/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -O3 -march=native -mtune=native -flto -ffast-math -funroll-loops -finline-functions -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_order_book.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_order_book.dir/test_order_book.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_order_book.dir/test_analytics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_order_book.dir/test_main.cpp.o -o test_order_book
